entry.title: FRUN Kernel Details in LMDB
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Our customer wants to use our FRUN to check their system kernel information but the one in LMDB is incomplete. Kindly please help on how we can get more all SAP kernel details of the managed system in FRUN. 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FRUN Kernel Details in LMDB
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

All instances kernel are shown in the LMDB and the Data Supplier Completeness Check result is green. LMDB only contains the shown kernel information. 

To see more information about kernel, please go to FRUN->Configuration & Security Analysis->Define the system extended ID->click on Search on the left panel->In Config Store, search SAP_KERNEL/S00001.

FRUN provides the Available CCDB Config Stores, and CSA Best Practices for more customization.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Prepare for the Future: Major SAP SuccessFactors Changes Coming in 2025 and 2026
entry.content: Thanks @nageshpolu for the sharing. Hopefully learning module also getting focus and able to catch up features as platform had today.

entry.title: Batch Job does not trigger replication to C4C
entry.content:
Hi - we have a (custom program) job that updates Sales blocks using our dunning process (KNVV-LIFSD). But once the update has been completed on the BP, it does not trigger the replication to downstream system like C4C. 

Note that if we update via MDG or BP tcode, replication happens without issues. How do we ensure that any batch jobs that updates master data triggers the replication?

Thanks in advance!

Marc

entry.title: Software 3.0 and us - My vision of GenAI wave for us SAP developers
entry.content:
Having been a technical consultant and Architect myself and also having built a consulting practice around technology, it is very much of my interest to understand how GenAI will affect our jobs, SAP technical consultants.

For this reason, I decided to lay out here my impressions and my understanding of what is happening and (again, my vision) of what may end up happening.

 

From Software 1.0 to software 3.0.

 

Software 1.0 is considered the classical programming we are all familiar with. Add here most programming languages. We code instructions for the machine to perform. Precise, exact, predictable.

I can’t pinpoint who created the term “Software 2.0”but it is widely recognized that Andrej Karpathy made it very popular. Link here https://karpathy.medium.com/software-2-0-a64152b37c35

In short, software 2.0 is the modelization of Neural Networks. We don’t give precise instructions. Machine learns from data. This is a very different story. We build a model to support the identification of cat photos and load so many pictures that at one point the “machine”, the model will predict with enough confidence if the given picture is or not a cat. It is radically different.

Jump forward to Large Language models, these ALSO have been structured on top of neural networks to “predict the next token”(sorry, had to add this as a joke, this expression is used sometimes to undermine the capabilities of LLMs. We know it is more than that, but at the same time, it is not wrong either)

Now, a new term is emerging, software 3.0 and this is where I would like to focus on in this BLOG.

Software 3.0 the composition of new applications/workflows/agents/teams of agents based on LLMs. In short, it may be a python or an ABAP application that is calling LLM’s at one point of another. A lot like the mashups of the early days, this composition programming is what I believe the new upcoming reality of programming, at least for genai based applications.

But this domain has very special and new techniques (RAG, Advanced RAG, Agentic systems, teams of agents, long and short term memory, tools/skills).

 

So, lets get to this: Who is this for and how will it work

 

GenAI, building the tool vs using it

 

An important distintion (and directly related to the difference in what is called Software 2.0 and 3.0) is that, you can work at building the LLMs (very few people work in this space, statistically) or fine-tuning (still, not necessarily a very often used technique). Or you can work a leveraging an existing LLM to build a GenAI powered application (we are back to programming)

 

 

Skills required

 

Software 1.0, as baseline requires development knowledge and skillls. They tend to be language specific (an ABAPer is an ABAPer, he may or maynot be able to code in PYTHON, if he can, it is because he is ALSO a PYTHON developer…). While the barrier of entry is arguably permeable, developers idealy have a software engineering background (Before I get stones thrown at me…. I’ve seen great developers with accounting background!)

Software 2.0 is very different. Trying to bridge developers over this domain is hard. This is a new field. Typically dominated by data scientists. Statistics and weights are at the center of everything.

But software 3.0 is back at programming. I don’t want in any way undermine the knowledge and experience required to make applications here, but calling a LLM api and embbed in your application is rather trivial. Maybe calling a vector DB to perform a RAG scenario is also achievable. These are simple scenarios but nevertheless, scenarios that are often the current use cases we see. More advanced scenarios exist and I will try to give my view on how this can optimally work.

 

Software 1.0 - Classic development

Tech background, Ideally Software engineering

Sofware 2.0 - Neural Networks - LLMs

ML and Deep Learning, NLP - Data Scientists

Software 3.0 - GenAI Embbeded applications

Tech background, Ideally Software engineering WITH ADDITION of GenAI development techniques

 

Who gets to work on some GenAI use cases

 

Level of skills by use case

Simple CAP/RAP Application leveraging SAP GenAI tools

Advanced CAP/RAP Application leveraging SAP GenAI tools

Advanced CAP/RAP Application leveraging GenAI Tools AND/OR Other platforms (Hybrid model)

Application Logic (CAP/RAP)

SAP Developer

SAP Developer

SAP Developer

Modeling in SAP GenAI HUB - LLMs + Prompts etc

SAP Developer

SAP Developer

SAP Developer for basic external platform modelling, if has this knowledge (Langchain, for example)

and/or

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Simple RAG Scenario in SAP BTP

SAP Developer

N/A

N/A

Advanced RAG Techniques

N/A

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Simple Agentic systems

N/A

SAP Developer

SAP Developer for basic external platform modelling, if has this knowledge (Agentic frameworks in langchain for example)

and/or

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Agent Skills/Tools

N/A

SAP Developer

SAP Developer for basic external platform modelling, if has this knowledge (Agentic frameworks in langchain for example)

and/or

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Advanced Agentic systems and teams of agents

N/A

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

chain-of-thought, reasoning, Long/short-term memory

N/A

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Let's get the conversation going. Post you comments here.

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA menu and dashboard do not appear when multiple add-ons are installed
entry.content:
We are working on SAP B1 HANA version 2311 and have installed multiple add-ons. When launching SAP B1, the menu and dashboard do not appear. Initially, I removed the add-on from SAP B1, and the main menu reappeared. However, when installing the same add-on on SAP B1 HANA version 2305, the issue did not occur. In contrast, on version 2311, the main menu disappeared.

I tried removing all the code in the add-on, leaving only the part that connects to SAP B1, but the issue still persists.

We would like to understand whether this issue is related to the SAP B1 version and how to resolve it.
Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Supportability Tools for SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello @ajankow,

Yes, it's normal.

The tabs shows all executed statements of the DDL category.

You can refer to the official document about the tab in more detail.

https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SUPPORTABILITY_TOOLS/62e56154d67a4597be212889125b0732/197a803f1a6f47659cc9cd973da8e81c.html

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Supportability Tools for SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello @albertosimeoni,

If you mean using the online analysis functionality. You should first add a connection in the VS code Database Explorer extension so that supportability tool could connect to the connection.

https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SUPPORTABILITY_TOOLS/62e56154d67a4597be212889125b0732/c18014a332994c54adfecb0bb841433c.html

For the privilege, Catalog_read is necessary one to access the monitoring views data behind the tools.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ERP公有云 2502.1 的最新增强功能：管理会计和利润分析
entry.content:
随着企业的不断发展，财务专业人员所使用的工具也在不断进步。最新的 SAP S/4HANA Cloud ERP公有云 2502.1 (HFC6) 版本在财务业务线中带来了一系列的改进，特别是针对管理会计和利润分析。在这篇博客中，我们将深入探讨这些需要用户操作或审核的功能，展示它们如何优化财务流程并提高运营透明度。

间接费用会计核算

在重新分配成本和收入中引入服务提供日期

在间接费用会计核算的过程中，企业会有服务人员针对已关闭的过账期间提交延迟服务时间的确认。间接费用会计需要在未清期间过账此日记账分录，但服务提供日期位于已关闭期间。为了简化这一过程，“重新分配成本和收入”应用程序现在加入了“服务提供日期”字段。该字段在重新分配文档详细信息的重新分配项目选项卡和分配项目选项卡中可见，并且在创建或复制条目时可编辑，但在反冲条目时被锁定，确保历史完整性不受影响。

有关详细信息，请参阅帮助文档。

成本中心组迁移到全局层级

通过引入“将基于集合的组迁移到全局层级”应用程序，将“管理成本中心组” 应用中定义的组迁移到全局层级结构变得无缝。迁移后，这些组可以在“管理全局层级”应用程序中作为层级进行编辑。这一过渡统一了不同应用程序中的财务数据，确保了统一和高效的层级管理。

“此功能”在系统中不会自动可用，而是需要在配置活动“激活功能”中激活“将成本中心组迁移到全局层次结构” (ftgl_uhmig_costcenter_group) 功能。有关详细信息，请参阅帮助文档。

库存会计核算

实际成本计算中的在制品数量重估

对于从事制造或长期项目的公司来说，在制品（WIP）是一个关键的财务指标。新功能增强了实际成本模块中的在制品数量重估，能够更精确地计算正在进行的项目成本。在 "计划库存会计作业" 应用中运行“实际成本核算的在制品数量计算：基于事件的订单和 PCC” 作业。准确的估值支持更好的财务预测和运营预算，使计算成本与实际项目进展保持一致。

改进的高级公司间利润计算

对于跨多个实体运营的企业来说，准确的公司间结算至关重要。高级公司间销售和高级公司间库存转储流程现在在货物接收和发票步骤中正确更新公司间利润（IC Profit）字段（物料价格分析）。这一增强功能减少了差异，确保公司间交易反映真实的财务表现，支持准确的合并财务报表。

总之，SAP S/4HANA Cloud 公有云版 2502.1 (HFC6) 版本为管理会计和利润分析带来了关键的发展，优化了财务专业人员生成见解和管理流程的方式。通过这些增强功能，该平台使用户能够以更高的准确性工作，为战略分析和决策提供了更大的机会。这些功能确保企业拥有强大的财务运营，使其能够自信地应对未来的挑战。

entry.title: Re: Migrate your code with UI5 linter – Autofix has landed
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"Last year, we focused on the detection capabilities of UI5 linter. In early 2025, we started on an actual migration functionality to be offered by UI5 linter, a.k.a "Autofix". Right from the beginning, our goal was to provide a similar developer experience as offered by the famous ESLint project. With UI5 linter v1.12.0, we are happy to announce the initial version of an autofix feature. You can directly use the "--fix" argument to let UI5 linter apply fixes to your code automatically."

 

Thanks for your kindly sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: How to attach the uploaded files of sap BPA to email
entry.content:
Hi all,

In sap build process automation workflow, I used DMS to upload files.

Also, I used email notification for user alert.

And, I would like to attach the uploaded file from BPA workflow to email that can be able to download the files from users.

Is it possible to do so?

If yes, how can I develop that kind of setting?

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Re: How to concatenate value in Global Variable
entry.content:
Hi @roberto4s,

Thanks a lot for your help and support. Finally, I got it. I don't even need the Content Modifier 6. But I would like to ask one thing. If I want to use that PartialInvoiceID from another flow, is it possible to use? In my project, I used local process call and PartialInvoiceID is in process call and I want to use that PartialInvoiceID from main flow. I want to call the PartialInvoiceID after the Process Call 1. Is that possible?

 

Best regards,

Pyae

entry.title: Re: Generation of MPIDs for the SAP ABAP system
entry.content:

MPID means maintenance planner transaction ID. 

 

Thanks
Mani

entry.title: SAP for MEユーザIDに登録しているメールアドレスの変更について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。

弊社ですが、会社統合に伴い、メールアドレスが変更になることになりました。

（受信は当面の間、可能ですが、送信は、DIGITS/4/1より新メールアドレスになることが決まっています）

このため、SAP for MEユーザIDに登録しているメールアドレスも、DIGITS/4/1より新メールアドレスに変更したいのですが、

どのように手続きしたらいいのでしょうか？

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP for MEユーザIDに登録しているメールアドレスの変更について
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

ご提示いただいた内容から、SユーザIDに登録されているメールアドレスの変更をご希望されていると理解しておりますが、よろしいでしょうか。
もし当方の認識が正しければ、SユーザIDのメールアドレスを変更する方法について記載されているKBAをお送りいたしますので、ご参考いただければ幸いです。

3108466 - How to update the email address for S-user IDs - SAP for Me 

上記について何かご質問等がございましたら、お気軽にご連絡ください。

よろしくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート
Judy

entry.title: 生产的AFVV表存的值不对，AFVV-ISM01~ISM06，存的字段值应该是生产订单工序报工工时的合计，现有一个生产订单只合计了最后两次报工的工时，不知道为什么，有什么修复工具吗
entry.content: The values stored in the produced AFVV table are incorrect. For AFVV-ISM01 to ISM06, the stored field values should be the total of the working hours reported for the operations of the production orders. Currently, for a certain production order, only the working hours of the last two reported operations are summed up. I don't know why this is the case. Are there any repair tools available?

entry.title: Re: Three Column Images with Caption shows wrong image si...
entry.content:
Hi Spark,

You can check the recommended images for each standard component in this link Image Recommendations for Career Site Builder | SAP Help Portal

To achieve your desired look and feel for the image, you may need to try out a few different approaches, including some trial and error, particularly cropping the image to make it fit as intended.

Hope this help.

Revee

entry.title: Re: Auto generate text for a field
entry.content:
Hi Rishabh,

If the Parent Object is within the MDF itself then you shall able to place a "On change" condition on the parent object itself, as soon as parent object is updated it will update the child name. 

Thanks & Regards

Arun

entry.title: Label in F4 is not getting displayed for the fiori local annotations
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a value help using local annotations for my custom fiori application. Below is the code 

            <Annotations Target="Odata.PO_Self_Service_HomePage/POStatus">
                <Annotation Term="Common.ValueList">
                    <Record Type="Common.ValueListType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Parameters">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterInOut">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="POStatus" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="POStatus" />
                                </Record>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="Description"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="CollectionPath" String="ZPOStatusValueHelp" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="SearchSupported" Bool="true" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="valueHelp" />
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
 
Issue is i dont see the PO status label in the output but strangely i could see the description. 

But the same i could see in the top to search. what is that i am missing here ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Re: How to Call Web Service BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkRepli...
entry.content: @milkamble65 WebService "BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out" in S4 System is indeed a Web Service of Category 'Service Consumer' that means we are consuming a Service from Other system(the Target system). Since here the Target system is CPI so my question is would you be creating a Service Provider exactly mimicking the 'BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out' in CPI? I remember we consuming a SOAP WS from CPI long before and if I am not wrong we were able to get it done using PORT only. Using Destination in this context am not aware of.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable now metadata could not be found.
entry.content: Wrong. Customers do not have access to their SEN subaccounts in BTP, but only SAP Cloud Operations.

Have nice day

@ANKIT_CHAUHAN 
SAP Business One 

SAP Business One Extensibility

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable now metadata could not be found.
entry.content:
Customers do not have access to the SAP Enable Now subaccount in BTP and never had. How the SSO setup process works:

1. When SAP Enabled Now system is provisioned, SAP Cloud Ops check if the customer has existing SAP IAS tenant. If there is already one, then we pre-configure it by creating a new application there for SAP Enable Now tenant. If the customer has no IAS tenants, then we provision a new one and pre-configure it.

2. Customer completes the configuration in the SAP IAS tenant (create a corporate Identity Provider and assign it to the SAP Enable Now application there) and submits an OSS message to SAP telling which IAS tenant they decided to use in the end and provide the attribute names they will send in a SAML claim.

3. If the customer decides to connect the SAP Enable Now directly to their Corporate Identity provider, then the customer creates an OSS message to request the SEN tenant metadata. Once the customer completes setup on their Corporate IdP side, they send to SAP the metadata file of the Corporate IdP and provide the attribute names so that the Cloud Ops can proper map them in the SAP Enable Now tenant.

There are several notes which explain the setup process step by step. Go ahead and look for the on SAP for Me portal..

Kind Regards, Anton

entry.title: Re: I want time off days previous year time account balan...
entry.content:
Hi @marko_crvenkov_94 

To show the time off balance of previous year and which has to be consumed/utilized by users based on the company's requirement. 

To achieve the requirement following things has to be followed,

1. Account Start Date and Account End Date - Usually account validation will be for calendar year.

                Example:- Account Start Date:- 01/01/2024 

                                 Account End Date :- 31/12/2024

2. Bookable Start date and Bookable until date - Usually bookable validation will be for calendar year or calendar year + 3 months in next year or Calendar year + 6 months in next year. In this case the entitlement added in current calendar year can be utilized till the  next calendar year 3rd month or 6th month. 

              Example:- Bookable Start date:- 01/01/2024 

                 User case 1:-  Bookable until date :- 31/12/2024 (If you are not extending the bookable end date)

                 User case 2:-  Bookable until date :- 31/03/2025 (If you are extending the bookable end date till March 2025).

                 User case 3:-  Bookable until date :- 30/06/2025 (If you are extending the bookable end date till June 2025)

                 If you don't want to execute the interim account and by default you need to extend the bookable until date during the account creation itself, you shall able to set bookable until date at time account page, "Account Booking Offset [Months]" - if you are setting this then you shall skip interim account update for extending the bookable end date.

3. Interim Account update:- This is a business rule, which will be executed to extend the bookable until date or reset the eligible entitlement, etc. Recommended to execute this rule on 31/12/2024 to extend the bookable until date as 31/03/2025 or 30/06/2025 based on the requirement.

4. Period End Processing:- This is a business rule, which will carryover the eligible entitlement to next year by closing the current year time account. Recommended to execute this rule after the interim account update, so it will close the 2024 time account in a future date or post extending the bookable until date.

If you have requirement to display the current year balance in next year and which has to be utilized then you should not close the current year time account till the defined duration and bookable until date has to be extended. You can also define the period end processing part, which will close the existing time account after defined duration.

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: Re: Name of iOS app is not showing correctly on iOS and MacOS
entry.content:
Dear Timo,

I just tested. Issue has disappeared, thank you for having fixed it.

Best regards,

Chantal

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for EHS: what is the "factory" field in S...
entry.content:
Dear Paulo,

the "factory" is special kind of EHS Location which must be set up in the customizing. It's a little tricky to understand it just from a written explanation, so I'm going to make an example.

As the "factory" is a special kind of EHS Location, we start with an exemplary location structure:

(1) ACME Industries

(1.1) ACME Europe

(1.1.1) ACME Germany

(1.1.1.1) ACME Plant Walldorf

(1.1.1.1.1) Storage Area WDF-A

(1.1.1.1.2) Storage Area WDF-B

(1.1.1.1.3) Production Area WDF-A

(1.1.1.1.4) Production Area WDF-B

(1.1.1.2) ACME Plant Berlin

(1.1.1.2.1) Storage Area BER-A

(1.1.1.2.2) Storage Area BER-B

(1.1.1.2.3) Production Area BER-A

(1.1.1.2.4) Production Area BER-B

(1.1.2) ACME Norway

(1.1.2.1) ACME Plant Oslo

....

(1.2) ACME Americas

....

Now, we have to decide on which level (which is represented by the Location Type) we want to create the Safety Instruction on which Plant. As an example, we can decide that the Safety Instruction can only be created for the Location Type "Facility" for the two German Plants. So, we have to define a clear/structure taxonomy of Location Types:

Level of Location StructureLocation Type
1Company
2Continent
3Country
4Plant
5Facility

Applying this for the example location structure, we'd have the following location types and (important!) plant attribute maintained against the EHS Locations:

LevelLocationLocation TypePlant
1(1) ACME IndustriesCompany 
    
2(1.1) ACME EuropeContinent 
    
3(1.1.1) ACME GermanyCountry 
    
4(1.1.1.1) ACME Plant WalldorfPlant1010
    
5(1.1.1.1.1) Storage Facility WDF-AFacility1010
5(1.1.1.1.2) Storage Facility WDF-BFacility1010
5(1.1.1.1.3) Production Facility WDF-AFacility1010
5(1.1.1.1.4) Production Facility WDF-BFacility1010
    
4(1.1.1.2) ACME Plant BerlinPlant1020
    
5(1.1.1.2.1) Storage Facility BER-AFacility1020
5(1.1.1.2.2) Storage Facility BER-BFacility1020
5(1.1.1.2.3) Production Facility BER-AFacility1020
5(1.1.1.2.4) Production Facility BER-BFacility1020
    
3(1.1.2) ACME NorwayCountry 
    
4(1.1.2.1) ACME Plant OsloPlant2010
    
2(1.2) ACME AmericasContinent 

Now, we can get into the customizing for the Safety Instruction (for Substances) in IMG:

Environment, Health and Safety -> Health and Safety Management -> Risk Treatment -> Safety Instructions -> Configure Safety Instructions for Substances

To set our "Facilities" in Germany (1.1.1.1.1 to 1.1.1.2.4) as Factories so that we can use these to create a safety instruction for, the following entries have to be maintained:

Plant IDLocation TypeStructureForm Object nameForm Object (Output Mgmt.)
1010FacilitySAP_SI_GERMANEHHSS_FSI_PDF_FORM_SAFETY_INST 
1020FacilitySAP_SI_GERMANEHHSS_FSI_PDF_FORM_SAFETY_INST 
...    

Let's say, as another example, the Norwegian Plant is quite small and safety instructions shall only be created on a Plant level, we add the following entry:

Plant IDLocation TypeStructureForm Object nameForm Object (Output Mgmt.)
2010PlantZEHS_SI_NORWAYEHHSS_FSI_PDF_FORM_SAFETY_INST 

 

To answer your initial question about "What is the Factory" ?

The factory is a combination of Location Type and Plant ID. Based on the configuration of the Safety Instructions, you can restrict on what location types / plants the Safety Instructions can be created on. Based on the type of Safety Instruction (Substance, Equipment, Generic), the Factory might be a different set of Locations. Same applies for the Hazardous Substance Inventory.

I hope this explanation helps you in understanding the Factory concept.

With kind regards,

Michael

entry.title: How to Reuse existing system identifiers for Change Request Management App data after migration.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We have the following systems migrated to S/4 BW HANA and to private cloud "RISE with SAP".
EB2, QB2, PB2.

Now we have both old and new entries for the same SID's in SLD and LMDB.

EB2, QB2, PB2 (old entries)
EB200001, QB200001, PB200001 (There is complete changes in Hostname, Installation numbers and system numbers)

We have the following applications Charm, ITSM are configured for the old system entries EB2, QB2, PB2.

In order to Reuse existing system identifiers entries for Change Request Management application data without having to create new configurations for the migrated system from scratch for the migrated systems EB200001, QB200001, PB200001 and there are open change documents.

I have the went through the following document and KBA's 

1694004 - Dealing with duplicate technical system names (SIDs)
1747926 - Dealing with duplicate technical system names (old SLD)
attached txt document of section 3.3 Reuse Existing System Identifier Entries in Change
Request Management) from SAP Document link Migration of a Customer-Managed System to ServiceProviderLandscape(PrivateCloud) 

Kindy provide some guidance for right approach from the mentioned "KBAs or shared link 3.3 Reuse Existing System Identifier Entries in Change Request Management) txt document" to Reuse existing system identifiers entries for Change Request Management application data without having to create new configurations for the migrated system from scratch and also without data loss as we have open change documents.

Regards

Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: Resend SDS(Safety data sheet)
entry.content:
Hello

after reading again. This is an option to go.

1.) in SAP Transaction you know: Initator, Material Specification number, genvar, language and reciepient

2.) using CG54 you can prepare the same "hit" (material / Specification / genvar /language) and select the recepient / Initiator and then you can do a "MAN_CALL" (recipient in this cas is the customer)

Very simple thing

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Hello we have problems with Office Key user in CG54
entry.content:
Hello i will check this; but i would not assume an authorization problem

in relation to: https://dev-workbench.com/en/sap-dictionary/authorization-object/c_sher_td2

I can not see any dependency to the "Office User". And as mentioned: if we identify the key on data base level and the user enters the key a "dispatch" of SDS is possible.

I need to look for my  notes to list here the ABAP routines we have identified so far which may help to get rid of the probelm

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Blog it Forward - Raquel Cunha - version 2025
entry.content:
What an amazing blog post. I could feel the emotion and I know AI didn't write this up. You've got a great story to tell and the story is continuing so I'm also looking forward to what is still to come.

I have enjoyed being at the events together and working together over the years, we definitely are friends that live far away from each other.

Hopefully we have other opportunities to work together in the future. I know that if you're on the project, that part will be done right and with great quality. International borders don't matter in that sense. Long live the possibility to work remote.

Looking forward to read about your next chapters 🙂

entry.title: Re: Strategic Decision Paths for Managing Hazardous Substances: SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA Migration
entry.content:
Hello 

regaring the option of "Product Compliance". I am not sure here and do see any "link"

In S/4 HANA we have "EHS New" and "Product Compliance" new. For S/4 HANA: Product Compliance is not the tool to support "HSM" but "EHS new" (base don my understanding of SAP HELP docu)

So please explain: the  Product Compliance stroy (in S/4 HANA). I would be interested if i am understanding the SAP Roadmap correct

Thanks

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Hi Priyanka,Just like UPDATE_INSERT, Do SAP CPI suppo...
entry.content: Thank you, Rohit! I have a question—can we use UPDATE_INSERT in this case? The issue with INSERT occurs when a record is already present in the database, preventing insertion and causing an error. If we use UPDATE_INSERT, it will update the existing record if it's already in the database, avoiding the error. Please share your thoughts on this.

entry.title: No service found for namespace '', name 'API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;V=0002', version '0001'
entry.content:
I got the following message when I executed a GET API call (Outbound Delivery (A2X)) from an EAI tool (DataSpider).

status_code：403

reason_phrase：Forbidden

error_response_body：

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
	<code>/IWFND/MED/170</code>
	<message xml:lang="en">No service found for namespace '', name 'API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;V=0002', version '0001'</message>
	<innererror>
		<application>
			<component_id/>
			<service_namespace>/SAP/</service_namespace>
			<service_id>API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV%3Bv%3D0002</service_id>
			<service_version>0001</service_version>
		</application>
		<transactionid>600414ADECD10080E0067E51B439B0D4</transactionid>
		<timestamp>20250328055300.1272630</timestamp>
		<Error_Resolution>
			<SAP_Transaction>For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader "SAP Gateway Error Log" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details</SAP_Transaction>
			<SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https:/service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
		</Error_Resolution>
		<errordetails/>
	</innererror>
</error>

It also looks like this on the app "Message Monitoring : OData Error Data Log - SAP Application Interface Framework (F6961)". (Basically the same as above)

StatusProcessing DateMessage IDLog MessagesUser NameService NamespaceService NameABAP ComponentABAP PackageTransaction IDRequest URL
Error

March 28, 2025, 3:06:16 PM GMT+09:00

C72887A0EF701FE082F35843938C2659

No service found for namespace '', name 'API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;V=0002', version '0001'

CC0000000002　No_authority_to_see_detailn/a

/IWFND/MED_PER_DEV_LANGU

600414ADECD101B0E0067E5E9845B322

/sap/opu/odata/sap/***No_authority_to_see_detail***

I set USER, PASSWORD, X-CSRF-TOKEN, SET-COOKIE on header correctly.

The Request URL was like this

https://my******-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;v=0002/A_OutbDeliveryHeader?$top=50

I tried the same thing on a different EAI tool (Asteria) but did not received this error.

I would appreciate it if you gave me anything related to this error!!

Thanks.

Regards,

entry.title: MRP-Type(Dismm) Field usage issue in Structure
entry.content:
Hello All

In custom structure where i have a field DISMM(MRP-type) which is causing an ATC P1 issue 
Short text : SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item SI_PP14: Logistics_PP-MRP - Forecast Based Plann
Note : 3211383
I have used this structure in my report and due to usage of it , i am getting an ATC issue in structure
I want to know how i can deal with this issue, i need a field DISMM in report which has been fetched from marc and displaying to user through ALV i can't remove the field i need it and i am unable to find a solution or else pragmas.
So can anyone who has worked on S4 Hana Migration help me out 

Thanks in Advance

#ABAP #S4 Hana #MRP Type #ATC #CCA  #SAP Technical  #MRP #dismm

entry.title: Re: ALV Grid Refresh after Handle_get_changed

entry.title: Re: Negative value not allowed for depreciation area 93
entry.content: Thank you Mark for confirming my thoughts. We have tried changing the other depr areas to allow negative signs (in Additional Parameters) but with no success to achieve the wanted outcome. Any other ideas?

entry.title: How to match the numbers in "Users Authorized to Debug / Replace" in EWA report
entry.content:
We would like to understand how the EWA report is calculating this authorization checks for "Users Authorized to Debug / Replace" in EWA report.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to match the numbers in "Users Authorized to Debu...
entry.content:
We can see the below content in EWA report .
=================
11.2.5.1.2 Users Authorized to Debug / Replace
Authorization objects: Object 1: S_DEVELOP with ACTVT=02 (change) and OBJTYPE=DEBUG
=================

The checks should be performed via SUIM.
Considering that duplicate names are removed and only unlocked users are considered.

Steps:
Navigate to transaction SUIM - Expand User - Expand Users by Complex Selection Criteria - Execute Users by Complex Selection Criteria
Enter Object 1: S_DEVELOP with ACTVT=02 (change) and OBJTYPE=DEBUG, select "Only users without locks".
And then match the numbers with the number in EWA report.

entry.title: Work Center Auto Update in PM Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I wanted to know if it is possible to set the work center to auto update when a confirmation is performed.It should assume the work center of the person that performed the actual work and not the planned work center. 

One can plan for a certain skill level but work gets performed by a different one.

there is no direct interface in my knowledge, which means you need an alternative solution or middleware to replace Oracle.

For SCIM API, could you please clarify why it seems not working for you?

Best regards,

Sirui

entry.title: Re: SAP Marketing Cloud Release 2402 is Here!
entry.content: @andreasfranz

entry.title: Re: Configuring BTP Destination in Advanced Event Mesh fo...
entry.content:
If I understand your setup correctly, you are using the AEM REST Delivery Point feature to have AEM push the events to CAP? This requires indeed quite some configuration in AEM and (imho) creates a quite tight coupling between AEM and your CAP app. And no, there is no destination support inside AEM.

While it is a valid approach and will work great, I tend to approach the connectivity in the opposite direction, from CAP to AEM (or any other messaging option such as the Event Mesh of SAP Integration Suite or the SAP Cloud Application Event Hub).

Have a look at the following sample repository containing an example for both EM and AEM: https://github.com/willempardaens/cap-eventing. You will notice that it is the CAP application taking the initiative to connect/listen to AEM. The credentials to connect to AEM can come from a service binding to avoid hard-coding.

At this point in time CAP does not have native support for AEM, but the team is working on it (see official roadmap item: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?q=advanced%252520event%252520mesh&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=0D8AD41AB0071EDF95844C515718CA24), so for now you can use the sample code to explore the overall approach and POC, and switch to the native support once available.

Also have a look at @ajmaradiaga 's recent eBook on the same topic: https://www.sap-press.com/developing-event-driven-integrations-with-sap-btp_6021/

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)的初级架构理解
entry.content:
自己属于Open系开发，目前刚刚着手计划转型SAP-BTP，感谢分享！！！

让自己对于SAP-BTP有了一个初步了解。

entry.title: Consume ABAP RFC Function Modules in CAP
entry.content:
Introduction

It has been possible for some time now to use ABAP RFC function modules in CAP applications. This provides a convenient way to integrate with existing ABAP functionality without needing to create a custom OData API when a standard one is unavailable. By leveraging standard RFC function modules, you can avoid unnecessary custom development in your backend system.

In this blog post, I’ll show you how to configure Build Code and VSCode to use ABAP RFC function modules.

However, use this approach carefully and only when necessary. I still recommend using APIs whenever possible—resorting to RFCs should be your last option.

Prerequisite

To try this out, I set up my own ABAP Developer system. You can do the same by downloading and installing it as described in the official documentation: https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial

Download docker image

docker pull sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01

Create a docker container:

docker run --stop-timeout 3600 -it --name a4h -h vhcala4hci -p 3200:3200 -p 3300:3300 -p 8443:8443 -p 30213:30213 -p 50000:50000 -p 50001:50001 sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01 --skip-limits-check

Start ABAP system:

docker start -ai a4h

Start cloud connector:

docker exec -it a4h bash 
/usr/local/sbin/rcscc_daemon start

Configure Cloud Connector (only for Build Code)

The configuration of the cloud connector is described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/build_code/d0d8f5bfc3d640478854e6f4e7c7584a/892114ce078b4e17a9ff7e751e6330cc.html#explore-sap-system-functions

With more details on this page, including principal propagation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/configure-access-control-rfc

Since my ABAP Developer Edition is not fully configured, I opted for a simplified setup using a technical user.

In the Cloud Connector, I configured access to the ABAP system using its IP address:

In the list of recources, I defined all Function modules I wanted to use:

Overall, it should look like this:

BTP Destination (only for Build Code)

In BTP, I configured the following destination using the virtual hostname, authenticated with my own user. Below is the destination configuration:

 Build Code

Start by creating a new Full Stack Application in Build Code. If the following functionality is not available immediately, you may need to recreate the project and developer space after setting up the destination. (In my case, I had to recreate the project and space after the destination was created.)

Go to the storyboard and add a new external resource:

Here, you’ll now have the option “Function”  and you’ll find the earlier created destination:

Now, you can start searching for Function Modules to use in your CAP project:

Once you found the Function Module, you can add it to your project.

This will also request to fill in a username and password for the npm repository, which you can create here: https://ui.repositories.cloud.sap/www/webapp/users

You need to take the NPM Base64 Credentials:

This will give you a base64 string which you cannot use in the login page in Build Code. I skipped this and just pasted the NPM Base64 credentials in the .npmrc file:

From here on, you can create a service

I copied the definition of the CDS for the service from the sample repository created by  : https://github.com/gregorwolf/cap-rfc/blob/main/srv/UserService.cds

To use the Function Module, you need to implement the following logic behind the CDS definition. I took this example from Gregor’s sample repository: https://github.com/gregorwolf/cap-rfc/blob/main/srv/UserService.js

 

Ready to start! This might still lead to the following error:

You can solve it by running “npm i -D @SAP-rfc/node-rfc-library“. If this fails, it means that the config in .npmrc is not correct or the user does not have access to the npm repository.

Once installed, your application should run! 

VSCode

Create a new CAP project using CDS CLI as described in the CAP documentation:  https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/tools/cds-cli#cds-init

Also for VSCode you need to configure the credentials to the npm repository for the rfc library:

Once that’s in place, you can install the rfc library:

Additionally, you have to configure the system in the .env file using the same properties like for the destination in BTP:

Use the following command to import an ABAP Function Module:

Provide the same cds and implementation for the service and it will run just like in Build Code.

Additionally

 In this blog post, I used my own user to connect from CAP to my SAP system. However, for a productive scenario, a technical user won’t be sufficient, and principal propagation will be required. As the next step, I plan to configure principal propagation. In the meantime, feel free to try it yourself by changing the authentication type of the destination to PrincipalPropagation:

 
And follow the config here: https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/configure-access-control-rfc

 

Conclusion

Everything is possible—but remember, with great power comes great responsibility. Use this approach wisely and only when truly necessary.

Special thanks for Gregor Wolf who already made a sample repository on GitHub: https://github.com/gregorwolf/cap-rfc

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Enabling secure communication between S/4HANA & OpenText Webviewer to facilitate preview of
entry.content: This method (obviously) doesn't work when using Fiori through Launchpad or Build Work Zone. We have a ticket with OpenText open to remedy this.

entry.title: Re: Pipeline Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for XI [...
entry.content:
this is a bug of the handled by integration flow feature of the XI adapter, I have raised an incident ticket and development promised to patch the tenants soon, as long as you face the error, you may revert back the version of the XI inbound flow to version 1.0.2, then however you can use the XI end point only for async messages and not for sync, for handling both we had to switch to the handled by integration flow feature

Alex

entry.title: Re: New Pipeline Concept features: new partner id definition, alternative partner, bypass option
entry.content:
@Benko see my answer at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/pipeline-generic-step01-inbound-processing-for-xi-fails/qaq-p/14059152#M4908479

Alex

entry.title: Re: Stock Load Process for Handling Unit Managed locations

entry.title: Re: Consume ABAP RFC Function Modules in CAP
entry.content:
Hi @WouterLemaire,

Is the approach described here a result of the recent delivery of the related SAP roadmap item?: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?setId=1ce2c200-5ce0-42f4-a991-dc0f2b103cb5&range=FIRST-LAST#;INNO=ABC1893F1B121EEEB9BD9D89D2AE9F00

entry.title: Re: How to Troubleshoot a HANA Live Report Performance Is...
entry.content:
Hello. To address the performance issues in your CDS view with nested aggregations in a production environment, follow these structured steps:

1. Analyze Execution Plan for Bottlenecks

  • Identify Full Scans: Use HANA Studio's EXPLAIN PLAN to pinpoint large tables (e.g., MATDOC) undergoing full scans. Check if filters (e.g., date ranges) are applied early in the plan.

  • Index Utilization: Ensure indexes on filtered fields (date, plant, material type) are used. If not, verify predicate formats match indexed columns (e.g., avoid functions on indexed fields like TO_DATE(Field)).

2. Optimize Aggregations and Joins

  • Push Aggregations Down: Perform aggregations (e.g., @Aggregation.default: #SUM) at the lowest possible level (e.g., on MATDOC first) before joining with VBAP/Z-tables to reduce intermediate result sizes.

  • Use CE Functions: Replace SQL joins/aggregations with HANA-specific Calculation Engine (CE) functions (e.g., CE_JOIN, CE_AGGREGATION) for optimized execution:

    sql
    Copy
    CE_JOIN(CE_AGGREGATION(MATDOC, [...]), VBAP, [...]).

  • Avoid Nested Aggregations: Break complex aggregations into separate views to force materialization points and prevent redundant calculations.

3. Filter Handling and Client Management

  • Explicit Client Handling: Ensure all joins include MANDT (client) fields to avoid cross-client data scans:

    sql
    Copy
    ON matdoc.mandt = vbap.mandt AND ...

  • Filter Pushdown: Use $parameters.<filter> in CDS to enforce early filter application. Combine with @Optimization.Filter.requiredFields to guide the optimizer.

4. Column Store and Partitioning

  • Column Store: Confirm MATDOC and other large tables are stored in columnar format (transaction SE11 > Technical Settings). Migrate row-store tables if necessary.

  • Partitioning: Partition MATDOC by date (e.g., range partitioning on BUDAT) to enable partition pruning during date-range queries.

5. Authorization and Analytic Privileges

  • Test Without Authorization: Temporarily disable CDS authorization checks (e.g., @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_ALLOWED) to rule out overhead from authorization logic.

  • Simplify Analytic Privileges: If analytic privileges are applied, ensure they use static filters (e.g., fixed plant codes) rather than dynamic joins.

6. HANA-Specific Optimizations

  • Materialized Views: Pre-aggregate MATDOC data using calculation views or SQL-based materialized views for frequently queried fields (e.g., daily sums).

  • Update Statistics: Run UPDATE STATISTICS for tables involved to ensure the optimizer has accurate cardinality estimates.

7. Testing and Validation

  • Simulate Production Data in DEV: Copy a production data subset to DEV to replicate the issue. Use HANA Studio's SQL tracer (ST05) to capture the runtime query and analyze it with EXPLAIN PLAN.

  • Test Incremental Changes: Apply optimizations incrementally (e.g., pushdown aggregation first, then CE functions) to measure individual impacts.

Example CDS Adjustment:

abap
Copy
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZMATDOC_AGG'
define view ZMATDOC_AGG as select from matdoc {
  key mandt,
  key matnr,
  @Aggregation.default: #SUM
  sum(menge) as total_menge,
  budat
} group by mandt, matnr, budat;

Use this pre-aggregated view in your main CDS to reduce join complexity.

Focus on reducing data volume early via filter pushdown, proper aggregation structuring, and HANA-specific optimizations (CE functions, column store). Validate execution plans for index usage and client handling. Test rigorously with production-like data to ensure scalability.

entry.title: Re: Hi Priyanka,Just like UPDATE_INSERT, Do SAP CPI suppo...
entry.content: Yes, you can do so, but since the function UPDATE_INSERT can handle the checks on its own, the above steps will not be required

entry.title: req.user.id does not give me my user email id from SAP Build Workzone tile.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am trying to get the logged-in user from my SAP CAPM entity's userDetails to determine the data based on the user email ID. But when reading the req.user.id in workzone, I get 'system' as the logged-in user.

From the SAP Build Workzone tile - > req.user.id = 'system'

From SAP BAS connected with XSUAA binding, I get the - > req.user.id = ''srikar@gmail.com

Is there anything I have to do to get the logged-in user in server.js or a custom JS handler?

I opened Workzone and authenticated from the custom IDP from the organization using email. I need to validate the email in the SAP CAPM service. 

Any thoughts?

Thank You,

Srikar N

entry.title: Re: How to Troubleshoot a HANA Live Report Performance Is...
entry.content: Thanks! This solves my problem

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Tools 2503 Update: Icons, App Info Page, Adaptation Projects, Preview
entry.content: Regarding the virtual endpoints: I initialized git before performing this operation. In the terminal I see a list of changes being made to files, and files being deleted/renamed. But if I look at my git status, nothing actually changed. Is that normal?

entry.title: Delegate functionality in Sales Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hi,

Do we have the Delegate functionality in Sales and Service Cloud V2? How can i find it in All settings if the name of this functionality has changed.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Tools 2503 Update: Icons, App Info Page, Adaptation Projects, Preview
entry.content:
Hi @Christoph_Gollmick 
New icons can be made available under Fiori Tools Extension into below repo for developers to make use and search to their relevant icons
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/test-resources/sap/m/demokit/iconExplorer/webapp/index.html#

entry.title: Re: Configuring BTP Destination in Advanced Event Mesh fo...
entry.content: Thanks for the links 🙂 I was also not fully convinced of the approach that broker was leading the connection. I will try this out, and I think it will be a lesser refractor when cap has inbuilt support for it.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Retrieve Business Data in Custom Inbound AP...
entry.content:
Hi ArekA41,

please check the documentation for Providing Access to a Business Service That Consumes Released Objects.

The steps in the tutorial are done in the development system/tenant where you can use the SAP_BR_DEVELOPER role (template) to test a new custom service immediately without having to create an IAM app and assign it to a business catalog and a business role.

When using the custom service in a different system/tenant some additional steps are required as described in the documentation.

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: SAP BDC Trial Version Release
entry.content:
Hi All,

Could you help me determine the release date of the trial version of SAP Business Data Cloud? Clients are requesting a demo, and I’d appreciate any insights.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Lifespan of events and business services
entry.content: @carol_cai I don't want to delete them by myself. I want to know if it sometimes happens that SAP deletes/changes them, so that it is possible that the triggers I currently use aren't available anymore.

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hi @AlexanderRother 

I am using my sap trial account and want to use joule ( LATEST VERSION OF ECLIPSE ) ,

I think it will not work on trial , 

I have some discoveries like

First we need a partner account and need to buy the license

​I have read the comment section and am now confused about what to do. If anyone has solved this issue, could you please direct me to the steps required to start Joule in my Eclipse? It would be very helpful.

I have some license number what to use ?  

8019124 and 8019541 

Regards,

Basant

entry.title: Re: Last 10 SAP Activate 1 Minute Video's

entry.title: SAC – Data model and calculation method – specific values of dimension property
entry.content:
SAC – Data model and calculation method – specific values of dimension property: DRIVER_INPUT, CLOSING_INPUT and CHANGING_INPUT

Hello SAP-Community,

In the sample End-to-End Planning Process in Integrated Financial Planning for SAP S/4HANA we find the process step “Plan Balance Sheet” 

In this process step we find two Balance Sheets – Changing and Closing. From our understanding the business logic should be: Opening Balance Sheet + Changing Balance Sheet = Closing Balance Sheet.

This logic is reflected within each of those Balance Sheets.

Looking in the data model the only difference between the two Balance Sheets is the filter for the Calc Method property belonging to the dimension ‘SAP_FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT’ in the data model ‘SAP_FI_IFP_IM_FinancialStatement’. The changing and closing balance sheets are filtered by dimension property values CHANGING_INPUT and CLOSING_INPUT, respectively.

                                        

In the data model, we can see that the aforementioned G/L account dimension has members which have different Calc Method values. It means that only G/L accounts with the CHANGING_INPUT Calc Method property are shown in the changing sheet, whereas only the CLOSING_INPUT G/L accounts are shown in the closing sheet.

We recognize, that according to that setting, the respective accounts can be planned either by changing amount or closing amount. The assumption we made regarding the sample data and accounts is:

  • Planned by CLOSING_INPUT > Valuation accounts
  • Planned by CHANGING_INPUT > operational accounts
  • Planned by DRIVER_INPUT > data by accounts receivables or accounts payables

We analyzed, that both calculation sheets together give the complete balance sheet.

The questions are now:

  1. What is the difference between the calculation methods DRIVER_INPUT, CLOSING_INPUT and CHANGING_INPUT? Are our assumptions correct?
  2. How is DRIVER_INPUT calculated or entered?
  3. Why are the accounts labeled as it is with the corresponding Calc. Method (or empty)? How is this to interpret?
  4. How are both Balance Sheets technically connected? What is the business intention behind those both views? How should those be read?

Thank you for you explanations and best regards!
